commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the Matrix monitor command-output draft-progress path to build an identity-carrying progress line and adds a regression test for replacing a failed nested command line with completed output.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +66. Total +68 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main renders Matrix command-output progress as an unkeyed string while the shared merger only replaces keyed object lines, so a failed keyed item line can remain beside a later recovered command-output line. I did not run a live Matrix reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The next action is contributor or maintainer-supplied real Matrix behavior proof; there is no narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to apply right now.

target.title: fix(matrix): replace recovered command progress lines
target.body:
## Summary
- preserve Matrix command-output progress identity with item/tool call IDs so recovered command output updates the existing draft line
- prevent stale nested tool failures like `run openclaw cron -> run jq (agent) failed` from remaining visible after the command recovers
- add a Matrix monitor regression covering failed nested progress followed by completed command output

## Tests
- `pnpm -s exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-matrix.config.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/handler.test.ts -t "replaces recovered Matrix command progress"`
- `pnpm -s exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-matrix.config.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/handler.test.ts -t "streams tool progress into the Matrix draft preview when enabled|uses resolved Matrix account progress maxLines|replaces recovered Matrix command progress|keeps Matrix tool progress mentions inside code formatting"`
- `pnpm -s exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-matrix.config.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/handler.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
target.author: bdjben
